title: conyza retirensis
intro: Conyza retirensis, also known as Fleabane, is a perennial plant species native to the Andean region of South America, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Conyza retirensis include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Conyza retirensis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for different health applications.
